steps.content: The car must have the sticker for approval in the Mechanical / EV Inspection before performing the Rain Test.
The car must be complete (ready to Drive).
All accompanying members must be using PPE.
The vehicle must be off the ground in its jacking points.
No driver or member is inside the vehicle.
The vehicle must be completely off.
Instruct the ESO to activate the TS and wait for the RML to flash.

Inspect the TSSI for the IMD, confirming that there are no insulation faults. Then instruct the ESO to connect a resistor to the TSMP, inducing a fault. Inspect the TSSI for the IMD again, confirming that the system is operational and detecting the fault.
Reset the system and activate the TS again.
With the vehicle on jack stands and no personnel nearby start the water spray. Keep the spray on for 120 seconds.
Stop the water spray and monitor the vehicle for another 120 seconds.

The test is considered successful if the vehicle does not enter a fault condition for the entire 240 seconds. If the test is successful, it is considered complete. Contact the EV inspection leader to obtain the approval sticker.
